outputs.main.sas:
```r
# tlf-primary.R
# Program: 14-3.01 Primary Endpoint Analysis
# Description: ADAS Cog (11) - Change from Baseline to Week 24 - LOCF
# Input: ADADAS, ADSL
# Output: t_14_3_01_primary_endpoint.rtf

library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rtables)
library(car)
library(emmeans)

# Read datasets
adadas <- read_xpt("./adam/adadas.xpt")
adsl <- read_xpt("./adam/adsl.xpt")

# Filter to Efficacy population and relevant records
# LOCF at Week 24, PARAMCD = ACTOT (ADAS Cog 11 total score)
adadas_eff <- adadas %>%
  inner_join(adsl %>% select(USUBJID, EFFFL), by = "USUBJID") %>%
  filter(EFFFL == "Y",
         PARAMCD == "ACTOT",
         AVISITN == 24,
         ANL01FL == "Y") # LOCF analysis flag

# Prepare analysis dataset
adadas_anl <- adadas_eff %>%
  mutate(
    TRTP = factor(TRTP, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")),
    TRT01PN = case_when(
      TRTP == "Placebo" ~ 0,
      TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose" ~ 54,
      TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose" ~ 81
    ),
    CHG = AVAL - BASE,
    SITEGR1 = factor(SITEGR1)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CHG), !is.na(BASE), !is.na(SITEGR1))

# Get N counts per treatment
n_counts <- adsl %>%
  filter(EFFFL == "Y") %>%
  count(TRT01P) %>%
  mutate(TRT01P = factor(TRT01P, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")))

# Summary statistics function
calc_stats <- function(data, var) {
  data %>%
    group_by(TRTP) %>%
    summarise(
      n = sum(!is.na(!!sym(var))),
      mean = mean(!!sym(var), na.rm = TRUE),
      sd = sd(!!sym(var), na.rm = TRUE),
      median = median(!!sym(var), na.rm = TRUE),
      min = min(!!sym(var), na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(!!sym(var), na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# Calculate statistics
base_stats <- calc_stats(adadas_anl, "BASE")
week24_stats <- calc_stats(adadas_anl, "AVAL")
chg_stats <- calc_stats(adadas_anl, "CHG")

# ANCOVA model with treatment as categorical
ancova_cat <- lm(CHG ~ BASE + SITEGR1 + TRTP, data = adadas_anl)
anova_cat <- Anova(ancova_cat, type = "III")

# ANCOVA model with treatment as continuous (dose-response)
ancova_cont <- lm(CHG ~ BASE + SITEGR1 + TRT01PN, data = adadas_anl)
anova_cont <- Anova(ancova_cont, type = "III")
dose_response_p <- anova_cont["TRT01PN", "Pr(>F)"]

# LS means and pairwise comparisons
emm <- emmeans(ancova_cat, ~ TRTP)
pairs_all <- pairs(emm, adjust = "none")
pairs_summary <- summary(pairs_all)
confint_pairs <- confint(pairs_all)

# Extract pairwise results
low_vs_placebo <- pairs_summary %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline Low Dose - Placebo")
high_vs_placebo <- pairs_summary %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline High Dose - Placebo")
high_vs_low <- pairs_summary %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline High Dose - Xanomeline Low Dose")

low_vs_placebo_ci <- confint_pairs %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline Low Dose - Placebo")
high_vs_placebo_ci <- confint_pairs %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline High Dose - Placebo")
high_vs_low_ci <- confint_pairs %>% filter(contrast == "Xanomeline High Dose - Xanomeline Low Dose")

# Format output
format_stat <- function(val, dec = 2) {
  sprintf(paste0("%.", dec, "f"), val)
}

format_pval <- function(p) {
  if (p < 0.001) return("0.001")
  sprintf("%.3f", p)
}

# Build table manually using data frames
tbl_data <- data.frame(
  label = character(),
  placebo = character(),
  low = character(),
  high = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Header row with N
n_row <- data.frame(
  label = "",
  placebo = paste0("(N=", n_counts$n[n_counts$TRT01P == "Placebo"], ")"),
  low = paste0("(N=", n_counts$n[n_counts$TRT01P == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], ")"),
  high = paste0("(N=", n_counts$n[n_counts$TRT01P == "Xanomeline High Dose"], ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Baseline
base_n <- data.frame(
  label = "  n",
  placebo = as.character(base_stats$n[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]),
  low = as.character(base_stats$n[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]),
  high = as.character(base_stats$n[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

base_mean <- data.frame(
  label = "  Mean (SD)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$mean[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(base_stats$sd[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$mean[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(base_stats$sd[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$mean[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(base_stats$sd[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

base_median <- data.frame(
  label = "  Median (Range)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$median[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(base_stats$min[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ";",
                   format_stat(base_stats$max[base_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$median[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(base_stats$min[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ";",
               format_stat(base_stats$max[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(base_stats$median[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(base_stats$min[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ";",
                format_stat(base_stats$max[base_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Week 24
week24_n <- data.frame(
  label = "  n",
  placebo = as.character(week24_stats$n[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]),
  low = as.character(week24_stats$n[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]),
  high = as.character(week24_stats$n[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

week24_mean <- data.frame(
  label = "  Mean (SD)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$mean[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(week24_stats$sd[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$mean[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(week24_stats$sd[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$mean[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(week24_stats$sd[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

week24_median <- data.frame(
  label = "  Median (Range)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$median[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(week24_stats$min[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ";",
                   format_stat(week24_stats$max[week24_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$median[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(week24_stats$min[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ";",
               format_stat(week24_stats$max[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(week24_stats$median[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(week24_stats$min[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ";",
                format_stat(week24_stats$max[week24_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Change from Baseline
chg_n <- data.frame(
  label = "  n",
  placebo = as.character(chg_stats$n[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]),
  low = as.character(chg_stats$n[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]),
  high = as.character(chg_stats$n[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

chg_mean <- data.frame(
  label = "  Mean (SD)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$mean[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(chg_stats$sd[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$mean[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(chg_stats$sd[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$mean[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(chg_stats$sd[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

chg_median <- data.frame(
  label = "  Median (Range)",
  placebo = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$median[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"]), " (", 
                   format_stat(chg_stats$min[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ";",
                   format_stat(chg_stats$max[chg_stats$TRTP == "Placebo"], 0), ")"),
  low = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$median[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"]), " (", 
               format_stat(chg_stats$min[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ";",
               format_stat(chg_stats$max[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline Low Dose"], 0), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(chg_stats$median[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"]), " (", 
                format_stat(chg_stats$min[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ";",
                format_stat(chg_stats$max[chg_stats$TRTP == "Xanomeline High Dose"], 0), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Statistical Analysis
dose_resp_p <- data.frame(
  label = "  p-value(Dose Response) [1][2]",
  placebo = "",
  low = format_pval(dose_response_p),
  high = format_pval(dose_response_p),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

low_p <- data.frame(
  label = "  p-value(Xan - Placebo) [1][3]",
  placebo = "",
  low = format_pval(low_vs_placebo$p.value),
  high = format_pval(high_vs_placebo$p.value),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

low_diff <- data.frame(
  label = "  Diff of LS Means (SE)",
  placebo = "",
  low = paste0(format_stat(low_vs_placebo$estimate, 1), " (", format_stat(low_vs_placebo$SE), ")"),
  high = paste0(format_stat(high_vs_placebo$estimate, 1), " (", format_stat(high_vs_placebo$SE), ")"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

low_ci <- data.frame(
  label = "  95% CI",
  placebo = "",
  low = paste0("(", format_stat(low_vs_placebo_ci$lower.CL, 1), "; ", format_stat(low_vs_placebo_ci$upper.CL
